news.title:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.

news.title:
Bombay HC rules bank recovery laws can't override PMLA provisions.
Judgment affirms govt's primacy in action against proceeds of crime.
news.summary:
Bombay HC rules bank recovery laws can't override PMLA provisions.
Judgment affirms govt's primacy in action against proceeds of crime.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank announces changes in Statutory Central Auditors for FY 2025-26.
M/s P S D & Associates ceases as SCA; four firms continue as SCAs as per RBI directive.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank announces changes in Statutory Central Auditors for FY 2025-26.
M/s P S D & Associates ceases as SCA; four firms continue as SCAs as per RBI directive.

news.title:
London High Court rejects Nirav Modi's plea; extradition to India in PNB scam to proceed.
Nirav Modi is wanted in connection with the Rs 13,000 crore PNB scam.
news.summary:
London High Court rejects Nirav Modi's plea; extradition to India in PNB scam to proceed.
Nirav Modi is wanted in connection with the Rs 13,000 crore PNB scam.

news.title:
Optimo Capital raises ₹100 cr debt from PNB, following ₹150 cr equity funding earlier this year.
Optimo partners with Godrej Finance for ₹200 cr co-lending, claims ₹430 cr AUM with <0.7% NPAs.
news.summary:
Optimo Capital raises ₹100 cr debt from PNB, following ₹150 cr equity funding earlier this year.
Optimo partners with Godrej Finance for ₹200 cr co-lending, claims ₹430 cr AUM with <0.7% NPAs.

news.title:
Stocks to watch include Maruti Suzuki, Tata Steel, TCS, PNB, Varun Beverages, and Urban Company due to key developments.
Strides Pharma, Varun Beverages, and Tata Steel announce strategic acquisitions, while TCS expands Chennai office by 1.47 lakh sq ft.
news.summary:
Stocks to watch include Maruti Suzuki, Tata Steel, TCS, PNB, Varun Beverages, and Urban Company due to key developments.
Strides Pharma, Varun Beverages, and Tata Steel announce strategic acquisitions, while TCS expands Chennai office by 1.47 lakh sq ft.

news.title: CFM ARC secures bid for PNB's Gammon debt with a 73% haircut.
news.summary: CFM ARC secures bid for PNB's Gammon debt with a 73% haircut.

news.title:
PNB plans to sell Rolta's NPA worth Rs 450.85 cr via e-auction on Apr 7, 2026.
The reserve price is Rs 250 cr; property has Rs 2.1 cr municipal dues.
news.summary:
PNB plans to sell Rolta's NPA worth Rs 450.85 cr via e-auction on Apr 7, 2026.
The reserve price is Rs 250 cr; property has Rs 2.1 cr municipal dues.

news.title:
RBI imposed a Rs. 5.66 lakh penalty on Punjab National Bank for note shortage at Currency Chest.
The penalty, equal to the shortage amount, was imposed on March 10, 2026.
news.summary:
RBI imposed a Rs. 5.66 lakh penalty on Punjab National Bank for note shortage at Currency Chest.
The penalty, equal to the shortage amount, was imposed on March 10, 2026.

news.title:
PMLA court issues notices to Nirav Modi's brothers, associates over PNB fraud.
ED seeks to declare them fugitive economic offenders, confiscating assets in Rs 13,850 cr case.
news.summary:
PMLA court issues notices to Nirav Modi's brothers, associates over PNB fraud.
ED seeks to declare them fugitive economic offenders, confiscating assets in Rs 13,850 cr case.

news.title:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.
news.summary:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.

news.title:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.
news.summary:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.

news.title:
Fitch affirms PNB's BBB rating with a stable outlook.
PNB's viability rating upgraded to BB by Fitch.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms PNB's BBB rating with a stable outlook.
PNB's viability rating upgraded to BB by Fitch.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank participated in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day.
Only publicly available information was shared during the virtual meeting on Feb 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank participated in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day.
Only publicly available information was shared during the virtual meeting on Feb 23, 2026.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
ED to file chargesheet against Rohan Choksi in PNB fraud case.
Rohan is the son of fugitive diamond trader Mehul Choksi.
news.summary:
ED to file chargesheet against Rohan Choksi in PNB fraud case.
Rohan is the son of fugitive diamond trader Mehul Choksi.

news.title:
ED names Nehal Modi as a co-conspirator in PNB's ₹6,498 crore loan fraud.
Application filed to declare Nehal Modi a Fugitive Economic Offender (FEO).
news.summary:
ED names Nehal Modi as a co-conspirator in PNB's ₹6,498 crore loan fraud.
Application filed to declare Nehal Modi a Fugitive Economic Offender (FEO).

news.title:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.
news.summary:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.

news.title:
PNB shares rise over 3% as PSU Banks gain for the third session.
Midcap index up 302 pts to 60,183; Nifty Bank rises 377 pts to 61,551.
news.summary:
PNB shares rise over 3% as PSU Banks gain for the third session.
Midcap index up 302 pts to 60,183; Nifty Bank rises 377 pts to 61,551.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 216.5 Cr for Long Term Bond Series III.
Actual payment date was 16.02.2026 due to bank holidays on 14.02.2026 and 15.02.2026.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 216.5 Cr for Long Term Bond Series III.
Actual payment date was 16.02.2026 due to bank holidays on 14.02.2026 and 15.02.2026.
